title: Apartment fire escape without elevator
summary: Know two exits where possible, keep stairs and doors clear, take keys and phone only when immediately reachable, and close doors behind you.
content: Know two exits where possible, keep stairs and doors clear, take keys and phone only when immediately reachable, and close doors behind you. Use stairs and follow fire-service instructions; if the route contains smoke or fire, retreat and signal from a safer room. Do not use an elevator during a building fire unless emergency services explicitly direct it.
